hero.title: Find events, register, and check official results in one place
hero.description: RunGoMX helps runners find races and see official results, while giving organizers clear public pages people can trust.

proofPaths.title: Three clear ways to explore RunGoMX
proofPaths.description: Whether someone wants to find a race, confirm a result, or compare performance, these paths get them where they need to go fast.

events.title: Upcoming events
events.description: Browse live event pages with the details runners need before they sign up.

results.title: Official results
results.description: Find official results that are easy to search, review, and share.

rankings.title: Active rankings
rankings.description: See rankings that keep runners engaged between race days.

eventPages.title: Event pages that help people sign up
eventPages.description: Bring dates, distances, policies, and registration links together in a format that feels clear on both mobile and desktop.

highlights.clarity: Show the details runners care about without making them dig for answers.
highlights.trust: Give every event a public page that feels official and ready for participants.
highlights.conversion: Keep the path from landing on the page to registering easy to follow.

participation.title: A smoother path from first click to confirmation
participation.description: The public experience should make registration feel simple for runners while keeping organizers in control.

highlights.discover: Help runners understand the event quickly and decide if it is for them.
highlights.decide: Make pricing, dates, and key details easy to compare.
highlights.commit: Move people toward registration with confidence, not guesswork.

resultsRankings.title: Stay useful after race day
resultsRankings.description: Results and rankings give runners a reason to come back, track progress, and stay connected to the sport.

highlights.results: Publish results that feel official, clear, and easy to revisit.
highlights.rankings: Keep people engaged beyond one event with rankings tied to real results.
highlights.retention: Turn one visit into an ongoing relationship with the platform.

aboutBridge.title: Learn what RunGoMX does and why it matters
aboutBridge.description: Show visitors how RunGoMX connects event pages, registrations, official results, rankings, and support in one public experience.

finalCta.title: Give your event a stronger public home
finalCta.description: Help runners find the right event, register with confidence, and come back for official results after race day.
